description: PhyloTree mtDNA + source-audited Y-chromosome haplogroup defining SNP trees for haplogroup assignment via tree-walk algorithm. SNPs filtered to 23andMe v5-era array coverage. Resolution varies with the markers typed by each array revision.

mt.name: PhyloTree
mt.reference: van Oven M, Kayser M. Updated comprehensive phylogenetic tree of global human mitochondrial DNA variation. Hum Mutat. 2009;30(2):E386-E394.

Y.name: YBrowse hg19 SNP export
Y.array_coverage: Probe identifiers and GRCh37 positions observed across privacy-safe 23andMe v5-era coverage exemplars; genotype values were not retained.

references.title: A nomenclature system for the tree of human Y-chromosomal binary haplogroups
New binary polymorphisms reshape and increase resolution of the human Y chromosomal haplogroup tree
Multiplex single-nucleotide polymorphism typing of the human Y chromosome using TaqMan probes
A calibrated human Y-chromosomal phylogeny based on resequencing
The Y-chromosome tree bursts into leaf: 13,000 high-confidence SNPs covering the majority of known clades
A revised root for the human Y chromosomal phylogenetic tree: the origin of patrilineal diversity in Africa

omitted_nodes.A: No safe exact-clade array marker survived the provenance and ambiguity gates; independently reportable descendants were promoted to Y-Adam.
omitted_nodes.A1: P305/V168 mark a basal lineage that also contains BT; they cannot distinguish a terminal A1 call from B/CT in this pruned topology, so A1a and A1b1 were promoted [6].
omitted_nodes.A1b: P108/V221 are ancestral to BT and cannot distinguish a terminal A1b call from B/CT in this pruned topology; A1b1 was promoted [6].
omitted_nodes.B1: No safe exact-clade array marker survived the provenance and ambiguity gates; reportable descendants were promoted.
omitted_nodes.C2a: No safe exact-clade array marker survived the provenance and ambiguity gates; reportable descendants were promoted.
omitted_nodes.F1: No safe exact-clade array marker survived the provenance and ambiguity gates; reportable descendants were promoted.
omitted_nodes.GH: This composite topology node had no independent exact-clade array marker; G and H were promoted to F.
omitted_nodes.H1: No independent exact-clade array marker survived after lineal aliases were assigned to their deepest supported node; H1a and H1b were promoted to H.
omitted_nodes.I2a1: No safe exact-clade array marker survived the provenance and ambiguity gates; I2a2 was promoted to I2a.
omitted_nodes.I2b1: No safe exact-clade array marker survived the provenance and ambiguity gates.
omitted_nodes.J1b: No exact-label candidate was present in the verified-v5 discovery join.
omitted_nodes.T1: No independent exact-clade array marker survived after lineal aliases were assigned to their deepest supported node; T1a was promoted to T.
omitted_nodes.N1a: No safe exact-clade array marker survived the provenance and ambiguity gates; reportable descendants were promoted.
omitted_nodes.N1c: The source labels reflect incompatible N1 nomenclature versions and no independent exact-clade locus survived; N1c1 was promoted to N1.
omitted_nodes.MS: This composite topology node had no independent exact-clade array marker; M and S were promoted to K2.
omitted_nodes.S1: No exact-label candidate was present in the verified-v5 discovery join.
omitted_nodes.S2: No exact-label candidate was present in the verified-v5 discovery join.
omitted_nodes.Q2: No exact-label candidate was present in the verified-v5 discovery join.
omitted_nodes.R1b1a1: M269 maps to the downstream R1b1a1a source label and no safe exact-clade marker survived; R1b1a1a was promoted to R1b1a.
omitted_nodes.R1b1b: The only exact-label discovery candidate lacked sufficient identifier provenance for the audited registry.
